title: The Follower Mod
description: This simple mod adds only one mob: A Follower. You can tame your follower with emeralds, then upgrade their stats using experience.
body:
This simple mod adds only one mob: A Follower. 

![Follower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9293f6edddc62ac070d5d1368d906c424abba80.png)

You can hire your follower with emeralds, then upgrade their stats using experience (10 levels per upgrade)

![Level Up](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41664f3a8a8fec2dc3a2224eaa4d425aff11052d.jpeg)

Add golden apples to their inventory to save them from death!

(This mod is a work in progress. Many more features to be added)
